channel.title: Materials Testing
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Materials Testing

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Guanping Dong, Rui You, Sai Liu, Nanshou Wu, Xiangyu Kong, Pingnan Huang, Wenting Fan, Zixi Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2025-frontmatter3
